file.content:
package com.runvision.wear.ble

import java.util.UUID

/**
 * rLens BLE Protocol Implementation
 * Based on rLens BLE V1.0.1 Specification
 *
 * Packet Format: [Metric_ID (1 byte)] [Value (4 bytes, Little-Endian UINT32)]
 *
 * Reference: runvision-iq/source/ILensProtocol.mc (Garmin Monkey C implementation)
 */
object RLensProtocol {

    // ========== Service UUIDs ==========
    val EXERCISE_SERVICE_UUID: UUID = UUID.fromString("4b329cf2-3816-498c-8453-ee8798502a08")
    val CONFIG_SERVICE_UUID: UUID = UUID.fromString("58211c97-482a-2808-2d3e-228405f1e749")

    // ========== Characteristic UUIDs ==========
    val EXERCISE_DATA_UUID: UUID = UUID.fromString("c259c1bd-18d3-c348-b88d-5447aea1b615")
    val UNIVERSAL_SUBSCRIPTIONS_UUID: UUID = UUID.fromString("c1329ce5-b463-31a5-8b78-bd220c1480cd")
    val CURRENT_TIME_UUID: UUID = UUID.fromString("54ac7f82-eb87-aa4e-0154-a71d80471e6e")
    val BATTERY_LEVEL_UUID: UUID = UUID.fromString("33bd4a32-f763-0391-2820-55610f999aef")

    // ========== Metric IDs ==========
    const val METRIC_ELAPSED_TIME = 0x01    // Elapsed time in seconds
    const val METRIC_DISTANCE = 0x06        // Distance in meters
    const val METRIC_VELOCITY = 0x07        // Pace in seconds/km
    const val METRIC_HEART_RATE = 0x0B      // Heart rate in bpm
    const val METRIC_CADENCE = 0x0E         // Cadence in steps per minute

    // Additional metric IDs from spec
    const val METRIC_RECORD_STATUS = 0x01   // 0: Start, 1: Pause, 2: End
    const val METRIC_HEAT_DISSIPATION = 0x02
    const val METRIC_EXERCISE_TIME = 0x03
    const val METRIC_TOTAL_TIME = 0x04
    const val METRIC_PAUSE_TIME = 0x05
    const val METRIC_AVG_MOVEMENT_SPEED = 0x08
    const val METRIC_AVG_SPEED = 0x09
    const val METRIC_MAX_SPEED = 0x0A
    const val METRIC_AVG_HEART_RATE = 0x0C
    const val METRIC_MAX_HEART_RATE = 0x0D
    const val METRIC_MAX_CADENCE = 0x0F
    const val METRIC_AVG_CADENCE = 0x10
    const val METRIC_POWER = 0x11
    const val METRIC_MAX_POWER = 0x12
    const val METRIC_AVG_POWER = 0x13

    /**
     * Create metric packet with Little-Endian UINT32 encoding
     *
     * @param metricId Metric identifier (see METRIC_* constants)
     * @param value Integer value to encode (clamped to [0, Int.MAX_VALUE])
     * @return ByteArray 5-byte packet [MetricID, Value_LSB, ..., Value_MSB]
     */
    fun createPacket(metricId: Int, value: Int): ByteArray {
        // Clamp value to safe range [0, Int.MAX_VALUE]
        val safeValue = value.coerceIn(0, Int.MAX_VALUE)

        return byteArrayOf(
            metricId.toByte(),
            (safeValue and 0xFF).toByte(),           // Byte 0 (LSB)
            ((safeValue shr 8) and 0xFF).toByte(),   // Byte 1
            ((safeValue shr 16) and 0xFF).toByte(),  // Byte 2
            ((safeValue shr 24) and 0xFF).toByte()   // Byte 3 (MSB)
        )
    }

    /**
     * Create elapsed time packet
     * @param seconds Elapsed time in seconds
     */
    fun createElapsedTimePacket(seconds: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_ELAPSED_TIME, seconds)

    /**
     * Create distance packet
     * @param meters Distance in meters
     */
    fun createDistancePacket(meters: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_DISTANCE, meters)

    /**
     * Create pace/velocity packet
     * @param secondsPerKm Pace in seconds per kilometer (e.g., 292 = 4:52/km)
     */
    fun createPacePacket(secondsPerKm: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_VELOCITY, secondsPerKm)

    /**
     * Create heart rate packet
     * @param bpm Heart rate in beats per minute
     */
    fun createHeartRatePacket(bpm: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_HEART_RATE, bpm)

    /**
     * Create cadence packet
     * @param spm Cadence in steps per minute
     */
    fun createCadencePacket(spm: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_CADENCE, spm)

    /**
     * Create record status packet
     * @param status 0: Start, 1: Pause, 2: End
     */
    fun createRecordStatusPacket(status: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_RECORD_STATUS, status)

    /**
     * Create exercise time packet
     * @param seconds Exercise time in seconds
     */
    fun createExerciseTimePacket(seconds: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_EXERCISE_TIME, seconds)

    /**
     * Create power packet
     * @param watts Power in watts
     */
    fun createPowerPacket(watts: Int): ByteArray =
        createPacket(METRIC_POWER, watts)

    // ========== Current Time Packet for Elapsed Time ==========
    // WORKAROUND: Send elapsed time using iLens's Current Time characteristic
    // This allows pause/resume to work correctly (watch controls the time display)
    // Reference: runvision-iq/source/ILensProtocol.mc:createCurrentTimePacket

    /**
     * Create Current Time packet with elapsed time
     *
     * Packet Structure (10 bytes):
     *   [0-1]  year (UINT16, little-endian) - current date
     *   [2]    month (UINT8, 1-12) - current date
     *   [3]    day (UINT8, 1-31) - current date
     *   [4]    hour (UINT8, 0-23) - ELAPSED hours
     *   [5]    minute (UINT8, 0-59) - ELAPSED minutes
     *   [6]    second (UINT8, 0-59) - ELAPSED seconds
     *   [7]    dayOfWeek (UINT8, 1=Mon...7=Sun) - current
     *   [8]    fraction256 (UINT8, 1/256 second) - always 0
     *   [9]    reason (UINT8, 0x02=External Reference)
     *
     * @param elapsedSeconds Exercise elapsed time in seconds
     * @return ByteArray 10-byte packet
     */
    fun createCurrentTimePacket(elapsedSeconds: Int): ByteArray {
        val calendar = java.util.Calendar.getInstance()

        // Year (UINT16, little-endian)
        val year = calendar.get(java.util.Calendar.YEAR)

        // Month (1-12)
        val month = calendar.get(java.util.Calendar.MONTH) + 1

        // Day (1-31)
        val day = calendar.get(java.util.Calendar.DAY_OF_MONTH)

        // Convert elapsed seconds to H:M:S
        val hours = (elapsedSeconds / 3600) % 24
        val minutes = (elapsedSeconds % 3600) / 60
        val seconds = elapsedSeconds % 60

        // DayOfWeek: Calendar uses 1=Sunday...7=Saturday
        // iLens expects: 1=Monday...7=Sunday
        val calDow = calendar.get(java.util.Calendar.DAY_OF_WEEK)
        val iLensDow = if (calDow == java.util.Calendar.SUNDAY) 7 else calDow - 1

        return byteArrayOf(
            (year and 0xFF).toByte(),           // Year low byte
            ((year shr 8) and 0xFF).toByte(),   // Year high byte
            month.toByte(),
            day.toByte(),
            hours.toByte(),
            minutes.toByte(),
            seconds.toByte(),
            iLensDow.toByte(),
            0x00,                               // Fraction256
            0x02                                // Reason: External Reference
        )
    }

    // ========== Universal Subscriptions Initialization Commands ==========
    // CRITICAL: Must be sent after BLE connection before sending exercise data
    // Reference: iLens-BLE-Connection-Best-Practices.md

    /**
     * Universal Subscriptions command 1: Read version/language
     * Write to UNIVERSAL_SUBSCRIPTIONS_UUID, wait for NOTIFY response
     */
    fun createUniversalSubCommand1(): ByteArray = byteArrayOf(0x10, 0x01)

    /**
     * Universal Subscriptions command 2: Read BT address
     * Write to UNIVERSAL_SUBSCRIPTIONS_UUID, wait for NOTIFY response
     */
    fun createUniversalSubCommand2(): ByteArray = byteArrayOf(0x10, 0x04)

    /**
     * Universal Subscriptions command 3: Read translation settings
     * Write to UNIVERSAL_SUBSCRIPTIONS_UUID, wait for NOTIFY response
     */
    fun createUniversalSubCommand3(): ByteArray = byteArrayOf(0x10, 0x03)
}

content.text:
핵심 발견 — 인코딩을 **실측 확정**했습니다. 이제 스펙에 추측이 아닌 바이트 값을 박을 수 있습니다.

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
- **속도 ×60 스케일링 트릭:** runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.mc:35`는 `velocityScaled = round(speedKmh × 60)`를 `0x07`에 보냅니다. rLens 펌웨어가 `0x07`을 ÷60해서 표시하기 때문(원래 페이스 sec→min 변환용 슬롯)이라, ×60을 미리 곱해 보내면 **소수점까지 보존된 km/h**가 HUD에 뜹니다. 예: 25.55 → 1533 전송 → HUD 25.55. Wear도 이 공식을 그대로 복제해야 바이트 일치.
- **인코딩은 이미 동일:** Wear `RLensProtocol.createPacket`의 LE u32 + `coerceIn(0, Int.MAX_VALUE)`는 iq `encodeUINT32`의 clamp `[0, 2147483647]`과 **완전히 같습니다.** → `RLensProtocol.kt`는 **0줄 수정**. 자전거 값만 매핑.
- **놓쳤던 항목 발견:** iq `CyclingStrategy.getTransmitIntervalSeconds()`는 **2초**(러닝 5초). 25km/h면 5초에 35m 이동 → 자전거는 더 잦은 갱신 필요. Wear `ExerciseService` 전송 게이트를 모드별로 분기(러닝 5초 유지, 자전거 2초)해야 합니다 — 스펙에 추가합니다.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

스펙을 작성합니다. 사용자가 "별도 브랜치" 작업을 명시했으므로 `runvision-wear`에 `feat/cycling-mode` 브랜치를 먼저 만들고 그 위에 문서를 둡니다(default 브랜치 보호). 커밋은 검토 후 별도로 확인받겠습니다.

input.content:
# RunVision-Wear 사이클 모드 설계

> 작성일: 2026-05-16
> 상태: 설계 완료, 사용자 검토 대기
> 참조 설계: `runvision-iq/Docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-cycling-mode-design.md`
> 참조 구현: `runvision-iq/source/CyclingStrategy.mc`, `runvision-iq/source/ILensProtocol.mc`

---

## 1. 목적과 범위

Wear OS 앱(`runvision-wear`)에 **사이클 모드**를 추가한다. 화면의 달리기/자전거 버튼으로 모드를 선택하면 자전거에 적합한 메트릭을 rLens HUD에 전송한다.

**핵심 제약**

1. **러닝 모드 사이드이펙트 0.** 러닝 런타임 동작은 바이트 단위로 동일해야 한다.
2. **공유 접점은 "추가만" 허용.** 러닝이 쓰는 파일이라도, 기본값이 러닝이고 러닝 경로가 무변경인 *추가* 변경은 허용(runvision-iq가 택한 방식).
3. **runvision-iq 바이트 미러.** rLens 펌웨어는 슬롯별 라벨이 고정. Wear 자전거 패킷의 바이트가 runvision-iq 자전거 패킷과 동일해야 HUD가 동일하게 보인다.
4. **별도 브랜치** `feat/cycling-mode` → 검증 후 `main` 머지.

**범위 밖 (별도 작업)**

- 타일 서비스(`RunVisionTileService`) 사이클 대응
- `versionCode` 증가 — 폰 앱과 `applicationId` 공유(versionCode 공유). 기능 브랜치에서 건드리지 않고 **릴리즈 시점에 양쪽 최신값 확인 후 별도 결정**.
- runvision-iq의 `totalAscent` 폴백 — Wear 비적용(§2.3 근거)

---

## 2. 메트릭 매핑

### 2.1 슬롯 매핑 (runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.buildPackets` 미러)

| 슬롯 ID | 러닝 모드 값 | 사이클 모드 값 | 인코딩 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `0x03` EXERCISE_TIME | elapsedSeconds | elapsedSeconds (동일) | u32 LE, 초 |
| `0x06` DISTANCE | distance (m) | distance (m) (동일) | u32 LE, 미터 |
| `0x07` VELOCITY | paceSeconds (sec/km) | **speedKmh × 60 (반올림)** | u32 LE |
| `0x0B` HEART_RATE | hr (bpm) | **hr (bpm) — 항상** | u32 LE |
| `0x0E` CADENCE | cadenceSpm | **altitudeM (현재 GPS 고도, m)** | u32 LE |

### 2.2 속도 ×60 스케일링 (바이트 미러 핵심)

rLens 펌웨어는 `0x07` 슬롯 값을 ÷60하여 표시한다(페이스 sec→min 변환용 슬롯). 따라서 km/h에 ×60을 미리 곱해 보내면 소수점까지 보존된 km/h가 HUD에 표시된다.

runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.mc:35`:
```
velocityScaled = (values.speedKmh * 60 + 0.5).toNumber()
```

Wear 복제 공식 (Kotlin, 바이트 동일 보장):
```kotlin
val velocityScaled = ((speedKmh * 60.0) + 0.5).toInt().coerceIn(0, Int.MAX_VALUE)
RLensProtocol.createPacket(RLensProtocol.METRIC_VELOCITY, velocityScaled)  // 0x07
```
- `+0.5 후 toInt()` = round-half-up(양수). iq의 `(x+0.5).toNumber()`와 동일. 음수 속도 없음.
- `coerceIn(0, Int.MAX_VALUE)` = iq `encodeUINT32` clamp `[0, 2147483647]`과 동일.
- `speedKmh`는 Health Services `SPEED`(m/s)×3.6 우선, GPS 델타 폴백. 소수점은 ×60 트릭으로 보존.

### 2.3 totalAscent 폴백 제외 근거 (Chesterton's Fence)

runvision-iq가 `0x0B`에 "HR 없으면 totalAscent" 30초 락을 둔 이유: Garmin **Edge 시리즈(자전거 거치형, 광혈류 HR 센서 없음)**를 같은 코드로 커버하기 위함.

Wear에는 그 기기 클래스가 없다. 이 앱은 손목 워치 전용이고 Wear OS 워치는 광혈류 HR 표준 장착 + 운동 세션 중 항상 활성. 따라서 iq의 `_hrEverSeen`은 30초 시점에 **항상 true** → `0x0B`는 **항상 HR**. 폴백 분기는 Wear에서 도달 불가능한 죽은 코드이므로 구현하지 않는다.

**미러 무모순:** iq도 HR이 정상인 케이스에선 `0x0B`에 HR을 보낸다. Wear는 그 케이스만 발생 → 바이트 동일 = HUD 동일. 폴백 제거는 결정 번복이 아니라 죽은 분기 제거.

HR 일시 드롭아웃 처리: 러닝 모드와 **동일하게** 처리(0 또는 직전값 — 러닝 코드 패턴 그대로). 사이클 전용 분기 없음.

### 2.4 전송 주기

| 모드 | 주기 | 근거 |
|---|---|---|
| 러닝 | 5초 (현행 유지) | 변경 없음 |
| 사이클 | **2초** | runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.getTransmitIntervalSeconds()=2`. 25km/h는 5초에 35m 이동 → 더 잦은 갱신 필요 |

`ExerciseService` 전송 게이트(`tickCount % N == 0`)를 모드별 `N`으로 분기. 러닝 N=5 무변경, 사이클 N=2.

---

## 3. 아키텍처

### 3.1 모드 진입

```
HomeScreen
  ├─ [달리기] 버튼 → nav "running" → ExerciseService(RUNNING)  ← 현행 경로 0 변경
  └─ [자전거] 버튼 → nav "cycling" → ExerciseService(CYCLING)  ← 신규
```

`MainActivity` `SwipeDismissableNavHost`에 `"cycling"` 라우트 추가. `"running"` 라우트·핸들러 무변경.

### 3.2 공유 접점 — "추가만" 변경 (러닝 경로 무변경)

| 파일 | 추가 내용 | 러닝 영향 |
|---|---|---|
| `ui/screens/HomeScreen.kt` | 자전거 버튼 1개. 기존 START(달리기) 그대로 | 없음 |
| `MainActivity.kt` | `"cycling"` 라우트 + 자전거 버튼 핸들러 | 없음 (`"running"` 무변경) |
| `health/ExerciseManager.kt` | `startExercise(type: ExerciseType = ExerciseType.RUNNING)` 파라미터화. 사이클 시 `ExerciseType.BIKING` | 기본값=RUNNING → 동일 |
| `service/ExerciseService.kt` | (a) 모드 보관 (b) 콜백→엔진 디스패치 `if(CYCLING) cyclingEngine else runningEngine` (c) 전송 게이트 `N = if(CYCLING) 2 else 5` | 러닝 분기 바이트 동일 |
| `data/db/WorkoutSession.kt` | 세션 생성 시 `exerciseType="CYCLING"` 기록 | 필드 이미 존재(기본 `"RUNNING"`), 스키마 무변경 |

### 3.3 신규 파일 (병렬 스택)

- **`engine/CyclingEngine.kt`** — Health Services `BIKING` 콜백 소비. 산출: `elapsedSeconds`, `distanceMeters`, `speedKmh`(HS SPEED×3.6 우선, GPS 폴백), `altitudeM`(현재 GPS/기압 고도), `heartRate`. 페이스 스무더·스트라이드 러너·정지 감지 **없음**(러닝 전용). 30초 락·totalAscent **없음**(§2.3).
- **`ble/CyclingPacketMapper.kt`** — `CyclingEngine` 산출 → 5개 패킷. `RLensProtocol` 함수 **무수정 재사용**:
  - `createExerciseTimePacket(elapsedSeconds)` → `0x03`
  - `createPacket(METRIC_VELOCITY, velocityScaled)` → `0x07` (§2.2)
  - `createHeartRatePacket(heartRate)` → `0x0B`
  - `createCadencePacket(altitudeM)` → `0x0E` (cadence 슬롯에 고도 m)
  - `createDistancePacket(distanceMeters)` → `0x06`
- **`ui/screens/CyclingScreen.kt`** — 2×2 + Ambient 변형(Wear 품질 가이드 준수, `RunningScreen` 레이아웃 미러). **워치 화면은 정직한 라벨**(슬롯 리매핑은 BLE 계층에만 적용): Speed(km/h) / Distance(km) / HR(bpm) / Altitude(m) + Elapsed. 일시정지/정지/탭-밝기 동작은 러닝 화면과 동일 UX.

### 3.4 미변경 파일 (러닝 핵심 = diff 0줄)

`engine/RunningEngine.kt`, `engine/DistanceCalculator.kt`, `engine/SpeedCalculator.kt`, `engine/PaceCalculator.kt`, `engine/PaceSmoother.kt`, `engine/AdaptivePaceCalculator.kt`, `engine/StrideLengthLearner.kt`, `engine/StopDetector.kt`, `ble/RLensProtocol.kt`, `ble/RLensConnection.kt`, `ble/RLensScanner.kt`, `ui/screens/RunningScreen.kt`, `ui/components/MetricItem.kt`, `data/RunningMetrics.kt`.

---

## 4. BLE 바이트 미러 — 골든 벡터

`RLensProtocol.createPacket`(Wear)과 `ILensProtocol.encodeUINT32`(iq)는 LE u32 + clamp `[0, 2147483647]`로 **이미 동일**. 아래 벡터로 패리티 테스트:

| 입력 | 슬롯 | velocityScaled/값 | 패킷 바이트 (hex) |
|---|---|---|---|
| speed 25.55 km/h | 0x07 | round(25.55×60)=1533=0x05FD | `07 FD 05 00 00` |
| speed 30.0 km/h | 0x07 | 1800=0x0708 | `07 08 07 00 00` |
| altitude 1200 m | 0x0E | 1200=0x04B0 | `0E B0 04 00 00` |
| HR 150 bpm | 0x0B | 150=0x96 | `0B 96 00 00 00` |
| distance 5000 m | 0x06 | 5000=0x1388 | `06 88 13 00 00` |
| elapsed 600 s | 0x03 | 600=0x0258 | `03 58 02 00 00` |

---

## 5. 테스트 전략

### 5.1 러닝 회귀 방지 (최우선)

1. **git diff 증거:** §3.4 미변경 파일 목록이 PR diff에서 0줄 변경임을 확인.
2. **러닝 BLE 바이트 동등:** 러닝 경로로 같은 메트릭 입력 시 변경 전/후 패킷 바이트 동일(기존 테스트 + 회귀 케이스).
3. **전송 게이트:** 러닝 모드 N=5 유지 확인.

### 5.2 CyclingEngine 유닛 (JUnit)

- `speedKmh` = HS SPEED(m/s)×3.6, GPS 폴백 경로
- ×60 스케일링 반올림: 25.55 → 1533, 30.0 → 1800 (§4)
- distance/altitude/HR/elapsed 산출 정확성
- HR 일시 null → 러닝과 동일 처리(0/직전값), 모드 불변

### 5.3 패킷 패리티 (골든 벡터)

`CyclingPacketMapper` 출력이 §4 표 바이트와 정확히 일치. (runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy` 인코딩 미러 보증)

### 5.4 실기기 검증

- 러닝 액티비티: 변경 전 빌드와 BLE 패킷 바이트 비교 (사이드이펙트 0 확인)
- 사이클 액티비티: rLens HUD에 속도(소수점 포함)/거리/HR/고도 정상 표시 + 2초 주기 갱신 확인
- 모드 전환: 자전거 종료 → 달리기 시작 시 러닝 동작 정상

---

## 6. 마이그레이션 및 호환성

- **기존 사용자:** 달리기만 쓰면 어떤 변화도 없음. `exerciseType` 미선택/달리기 = 기존과 동일.
- **rLens 펌웨어:** 변경 불필요. 메트릭 ID·인코딩 그대로, 값 의미만 워치 앱이 재해석.
- **versionCode:** 폰 앱과 공유(`com.runvision.runvision`). 기능 브랜치에서 미변경. 릴리즈 시 양쪽 최신 versionCode 확인 후 더 높은 값 +1 (별도 절차).

---

## 7. 미결 사항 (구현 단계 verify)

- [ ] `RLensConnection`/`ExerciseService`의 러닝 elapsed/일시정지 전송 방식(`0x03` 패킷 vs Current Time characteristic) 실측 후, 사이클이 **동일 패턴**을 따르도록 적용. (설계 결정은 확정: 사이클 elapsed는 iq처럼 `0x03`. 구현 시 러닝과 같은 일시정지 처리 경로 재사용 확인)
- [ ] Health Services `BIKING`에서 `SPEED` 데이터 타입 기기 가용성 — 미지원 기기는 GPS 델타 폴백(이미 설계에 포함, 폴백 우선순위만 구현 시 확정)

---

# RunVision-Wear 사이클 모드 설계

> 작성일: 2026-05-16
> 상태: 설계 완료, 사용자 검토 대기
> 참조 설계: `runvision-iq/Docs/superpowers/specs/2026-05-15-cycling-mode-design.md`
> 참조 구현: `runvision-iq/source/CyclingStrategy.mc`, `runvision-iq/source/ILensProtocol.mc`

---

## 1. 목적과 범위

Wear OS 앱(`runvision-wear`)에 **사이클 모드**를 추가한다. 화면의 달리기/자전거 버튼으로 모드를 선택하면 자전거에 적합한 메트릭을 rLens HUD에 전송한다.

**핵심 제약**

1. **러닝 모드 사이드이펙트 0.** 러닝 런타임 동작은 바이트 단위로 동일해야 한다.
2. **공유 접점은 "추가만" 허용.** 러닝이 쓰는 파일이라도, 기본값이 러닝이고 러닝 경로가 무변경인 *추가* 변경은 허용(runvision-iq가 택한 방식).
3. **runvision-iq 바이트 미러.** rLens 펌웨어는 슬롯별 라벨이 고정. Wear 자전거 패킷의 바이트가 runvision-iq 자전거 패킷과 동일해야 HUD가 동일하게 보인다.
4. **별도 브랜치** `feat/cycling-mode` → 검증 후 `main` 머지.

**범위 밖 (별도 작업)**

- 타일 서비스(`RunVisionTileService`) 사이클 대응
- `versionCode` 증가 — 폰 앱과 `applicationId` 공유(versionCode 공유). 기능 브랜치에서 건드리지 않고 **릴리즈 시점에 양쪽 최신값 확인 후 별도 결정**.
- runvision-iq의 `totalAscent` 폴백 — Wear 비적용(§2.3 근거)

---

## 2. 메트릭 매핑

### 2.1 슬롯 매핑 (runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.buildPackets` 미러)

| 슬롯 ID | 러닝 모드 값 | 사이클 모드 값 | 인코딩 |
|---|---|---|---|
| `0x03` EXERCISE_TIME | elapsedSeconds | elapsedSeconds (동일) | u32 LE, 초 |
| `0x06` DISTANCE | distance (m) | distance (m) (동일) | u32 LE, 미터 |
| `0x07` VELOCITY | paceSeconds (sec/km) | **speedKmh × 60 (반올림)** | u32 LE |
| `0x0B` HEART_RATE | hr (bpm) | **hr (bpm) — 항상** | u32 LE |
| `0x0E` CADENCE | cadenceSpm | **altitudeM (현재 GPS 고도, m)** | u32 LE |

### 2.2 속도 ×60 스케일링 (바이트 미러 핵심)

rLens 펌웨어는 `0x07` 슬롯 값을 ÷60하여 표시한다(페이스 sec→min 변환용 슬롯). 따라서 km/h에 ×60을 미리 곱해 보내면 소수점까지 보존된 km/h가 HUD에 표시된다.

runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.mc:35`:
```
velocityScaled = (values.speedKmh * 60 + 0.5).toNumber()
```

Wear 복제 공식 (Kotlin, 바이트 동일 보장):
```kotlin
val velocityScaled = ((speedKmh * 60.0) + 0.5).toInt().coerceIn(0, Int.MAX_VALUE)
RLensProtocol.createPacket(RLensProtocol.METRIC_VELOCITY, velocityScaled)  // 0x07
```
- `+0.5 후 toInt()` = round-half-up(양수). iq의 `(x+0.5).toNumber()`와 동일. 음수 속도 없음.
- `coerceIn(0, Int.MAX_VALUE)` = iq `encodeUINT32` clamp `[0, 2147483647]`과 동일.
- `speedKmh`는 Health Services `SPEED`(m/s)×3.6 우선, GPS 델타 폴백. 소수점은 ×60 트릭으로 보존.

### 2.3 totalAscent 폴백 제외 근거 (Chesterton's Fence)

runvision-iq가 `0x0B`에 "HR 없으면 totalAscent" 30초 락을 둔 이유: Garmin **Edge 시리즈(자전거 거치형, 광혈류 HR 센서 없음)**를 같은 코드로 커버하기 위함.

**미러 무모순:** iq도 HR이 정상인 케이스에선 `0x0B`에 HR을 보낸다. Wear는 그 케이스만 발생 → 바이트 동일 = HUD 동일. 폴백 제거는 결정 번복이 아니라 죽은 분기 제거.

HR 일시 드롭아웃 처리: 러닝 모드와 **동일하게** 처리(0 또는 직전값 — 러닝 코드 패턴 그대로). 사이클 전용 분기 없음.

### 2.4 전송 주기

| 모드 | 주기 | 근거 |
|---|---|---|
| 러닝 | 5초 (현행 유지) | 변경 없음 |
| 사이클 | **2초** | runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy.getTransmitIntervalSeconds()=2`. 25km/h는 5초에 35m 이동 → 더 잦은 갱신 필요 |

## 4. BLE 바이트 미러 — 골든 벡터

`RLensProtocol.createPacket`(Wear)과 `ILensProtocol.encodeUINT32`(iq)는 LE u32 + clamp `[0, 2147483647]`로 **이미 동일**. 아래 벡터로 패리티 테스트:

| 입력 | 슬롯 | velocityScaled/값 | 패킷 바이트 (hex) |
|---|---|---|---|
| speed 25.55 km/h | 0x07 | round(25.55×60)=1533=0x05FD | `07 FD 05 00 00` |
| speed 30.0 km/h | 0x07 | 1800=0x0708 | `07 08 07 00 00` |
| altitude 1200 m | 0x0E | 1200=0x04B0 | `0E B0 04 00 00` |
| HR 150 bpm | 0x0B | 150=0x96 | `0B 96 00 00 00` |
| distance 5000 m | 0x06 | 5000=0x1388 | `06 88 13 00 00` |
| elapsed 600 s | 0x03 | 600=0x0258 | `03 58 02 00 00` |

---

## 5. 테스트 전략

### 5.1 러닝 회귀 방지 (최우선)

1. **git diff 증거:** §3.4 미변경 파일 목록이 PR diff에서 0줄 변경임을 확인.
2. **러닝 BLE 바이트 동등:** 러닝 경로로 같은 메트릭 입력 시 변경 전/후 패킷 바이트 동일(기존 테스트 + 회귀 케이스).
3. **전송 게이트:** 러닝 모드 N=5 유지 확인.

### 5.2 CyclingEngine 유닛 (JUnit)

- `speedKmh` = HS SPEED(m/s)×3.6, GPS 폴백 경로
- ×60 스케일링 반올림: 25.55 → 1533, 30.0 → 1800 (§4)
- distance/altitude/HR/elapsed 산출 정확성
- HR 일시 null → 러닝과 동일 처리(0/직전값), 모드 불변

### 5.3 패킷 패리티 (골든 벡터)

`CyclingPacketMapper` 출력이 §4 표 바이트와 정확히 일치. (runvision-iq `CyclingStrategy` 인코딩 미러 보증)

### 5.4 실기기 검증

- 러닝 액티비티: 변경 전 빌드와 BLE 패킷 바이트 비교 (사이드이펙트 0 확인)
- 사이클 액티비티: rLens HUD에 속도(소수점 포함)/거리/HR/고도 정상 표시 + 2초 주기 갱신 확인
- 모드 전환: 자전거 종료 → 달리기 시작 시 러닝 동작 정상

---

## 6. 마이그레이션 및 호환성

- **기존 사용자:** 달리기만 쓰면 어떤 변화도 없음. `exerciseType` 미선택/달리기 = 기존과 동일.
- **rLens 펌웨어:** 변경 불필요. 메트릭 ID·인코딩 그대로, 값 의미만 워치 앱이 재해석.
- **versionCode:** 폰 앱과 공유(`com.runvision.runvision`). 기능 브랜치에서 미변경. 릴리즈 시 양쪽 최신 versionCode 확인 후 더 높은 값 +1 (별도 절차).

---

## 7. 미결 사항 (구현 단계 verify)

- [ ] `RLensConnection`/`ExerciseService`의 러닝 elapsed/일시정지 전송 방식(`0x03` 패킷 vs Current Time characteristic) 실측 후, 사이클이 **동일 패턴**을 따르도록 적용. (설계 결정은 확정: 사이클 elapsed는 iq처럼 `0x03`. 구현 시 러닝과 같은 일시정지 처리 경로 재사용 확인)
- [ ] Health Services `BIKING`에서 `SPEED` 데이터 타입 기기 가용성 — 미지원 기기는 GPS 델타 폴백(이미 설계에 포함, 폴백 우선순위만 구현 시 확정)

---

content.text:
Base directory for this skill: /home/jhkim/.claude/plugins/cache/claude-plugins-official/superpowers/5.1.0/skills/writing-plans

# Writing Plans

## Overview

Write comprehensive implementation plans assuming the engineer has zero context for our codebase and questionable taste. Document everything they need to know: which files to touch for each task, code, testing, docs they might need to check, how to test it. Give them the whole plan as bite-sized tasks. DRY. YAGNI. TDD. Frequent commits.

Assume they are a skilled developer, but know almost nothing about our toolset or problem domain. Assume they don't know good test design very well.

**Announce at start:** "I'm using the writing-plans skill to create the implementation plan."

**Context:** If working in an isolated worktree, it should have been created via the `superpowers:using-git-worktrees` skill at execution time.

**Save plans to:** `docs/superpowers/plans/YYYY-MM-DD-<feature-name>.md`
- (User preferences for plan location override this default)

## Scope Check

If the spec covers multiple independent subsystems, it should have been broken into sub-project specs during brainstorming. If it wasn't, suggest breaking this into separate plans — one per subsystem. Each plan should produce working, testable software on its own.

## File Structure

Before defining tasks, map out which files will be created or modified and what each one is responsible for. This is where decomposition decisions get locked in.

- Design units with clear boundaries and well-defined interfaces. Each file should have one clear responsibility.
- You reason best about code you can hold in context at once, and your edits are more reliable when files are focused. Prefer smaller, focused files over large ones that do too much.
- Files that change together should live together. Split by responsibility, not by technical layer.
- In existing codebases, follow established patterns. If the codebase uses large files, don't unilaterally restructure - but if a file you're modifying has grown unwieldy, including a split in the plan is reasonable.

This structure informs the task decomposition. Each task should produce self-contained changes that make sense independently.

## Bite-Sized Task Granularity

**Each step is one action (2-5 minutes):**
- "Write the failing test" - step
- "Run it to make sure it fails" - step
- "Implement the minimal code to make the test pass" - step
- "Run the tests and make sure they pass" - step
- "Commit" - step

## Plan Document Header

**Every plan MUST start with this header:**

```markdown
# [Feature Name] Implementation Plan

> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.

**Goal:** [One sentence describing what this builds]

**Architecture:** [2-3 sentences about approach]

**Tech Stack:** [Key technologies/libraries]

---
```

## Task Structure

````markdown
### Task N: [Component Name]

**Files:**
- Create: `exact/path/to/file.py`
- Modify: `exact/path/to/existing.py:123-145`
- Test: `tests/exact/path/to/test.py`

- [ ] **Step 1: Write the failing test**

```python
def test_specific_behavior():
    result = function(input)
    assert result == expected
```

- [ ] **Step 2: Run test to verify it fails**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: FAIL with "function not defined"

- [ ] **Step 3: Write minimal implementation**

```python
def function(input):
    return expected
```

- [ ] **Step 4: Run test to verify it passes**

Run: `pytest tests/path/test.py::test_name -v`
Expected: PASS

- [ ] **Step 5: Commit**

```bash
git add tests/path/test.py src/path/file.py
git commit -m "feat: add specific feature"
```
````

## No Placeholders

Every step must contain the actual content an engineer needs. These are **plan failures** — never write them:
- "TBD", "TODO", "implement later", "fill in details"
- "Add appropriate error handling" / "add validation" / "handle edge cases"
- "Write tests for the above" (without actual test code)
- "Similar to Task N" (repeat the code — the engineer may be reading tasks out of order)
- Steps that describe what to do without showing how (code blocks required for code steps)
- References to types, functions, or methods not defined in any task

## Remember
- Exact file paths always
- Complete code in every step — if a step changes code, show the code
- Exact commands with expected output
- DRY, YAGNI, TDD, frequent commits

## Self-Review

After writing the complete plan, look at the spec with fresh eyes and check the plan against it. This is a checklist you run yourself — not a subagent dispatch.

**1. Spec coverage:** Skim each section/requirement in the spec. Can you point to a task that implements it? List any gaps.

**2. Placeholder scan:** Search your plan for red flags — any of the patterns from the "No Placeholders" section above. Fix them.

**3. Type consistency:** Do the types, method signatures, and property names you used in later tasks match what you defined in earlier tasks? A function called `clearLayers()` in Task 3 but `clearFullLayers()` in Task 7 is a bug.

If you find issues, fix them inline. No need to re-review — just fix and move on. If you find a spec requirement with no task, add the task.

## Execution Handoff

After saving the plan, offer execution choice:

**"Plan complete and saved to `docs/superpowers/plans/<filename>.md`. Two execution options:**

**1. Subagent-Driven (recommended)** - I dispatch a fresh subagent per task, review between tasks, fast iteration

**2. Inline Execution** - Execute tasks in this session using executing-plans, batch execution with checkpoints

**Which approach?"**

**If Subagent-Driven chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development
- Fresh subagent per task + two-stage review

**If Inline Execution chosen:**
- **REQUIRED SUB-SKILL:** Use superpowers:executing-plans
- Batch execution with checkpoints for review

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
**테스트 인프라 확인:** 순수 JVM 유닛 테스트 (`app/src/test/kotlin/`) — JUnit 4.13.2 + MockK 1.13.8 + coroutines-test. Robolectric 없음. `RLensProtocolTest.kt`, `RunningEngineTest.kt` 등 기존 테스트가 패턴 레퍼런스. 실행: `./gradlew :app:testDebugUnitTest`. → `CyclingPacketMapper`/`CyclingEngine`는 순수 JVM 테스트로 TDD 가능 (Health Services·Compose 미목업 불필요한 순수 로직으로 설계해야 한다는 제약이 여기서 도출됨).
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

35	/**
36	 * Foreground Service for running exercise
37	 *
38	 * Keeps running even when screen is off or app is in background.
39	 * Manages:
40	 * - Health Services exercise session
41	 * - BLE connection to rLens
42	 * - Metrics updates (1Hz timer)
43	 */
44	class ExerciseService : Service() {
45	
46	    companion object {
47	        private const val TAG = "ExerciseService"
48	        private const val NOTIFICATION_ID = 1
49	        // Changed channel ID to force new channel with correct priority
50	        private const val CHANNEL_ID = "exercise_channel_v2"
51	
52	        // MAC binding: prevents connecting to a nearby stranger's rLens
53	        const val PREFS_NAME = "runvision_prefs"
54	        const val KEY_RLENS_ADDRESS = "rlens_mac_address"
55	    }
56	
57	    private val binder = LocalBinder()
58	    private val serviceScope = CoroutineScope(Dispatchers.Main + SupervisorJob())
59	
60	    private lateinit var runningEngine: RunningEngine
61	    private lateinit var exerciseManager: ExerciseManager
62	
63	    // Room Database
64	    private lateinit var workoutDatabase: WorkoutDatabase
65	    private lateinit var workoutDao: WorkoutDao
66	    private var currentSessionId: String? = null
67	
68	    // BLE 컴포넌트 - Service에서 직접 관리 (Activity lifecycle과 분리)
69	    private var rLensScanner: RLensScanner? = null
70	    private var rLensConnection: RLensConnection? = null
71	
72	    // 2-retry + new device registration mode
73	    private var scanAttemptCount = 0
74	    private var isInNewDeviceMode = false
75	    private var currentTargetAddress: String? = null
76	
77	    // BLE 연결 상태 (UI 관찰용)
78	    private val _connectionState = MutableStateFlow(RLensConnection.ConnectionState.DISCONNECTED)
79	    val connectionState: StateFlow<RLensConnection.ConnectionState> = _connectionState
80	
81	    private var timerJob: Job? = null
82	    private var wakeLock: PowerManager.WakeLock? = null
83	
84	    // Notification components - reuse for consistent Ongoing Activity
85	    private var notificationBuilder: NotificationCompat.Builder? = null
86	    private var notificationPendingIntent: PendingIntent? = null
87	
88	    // Observable state for UI
89	    private val _metrics = MutableStateFlow(RunningMetrics())
90	    val metrics: StateFlow<RunningMetrics> = _metrics
91	
92	    private val _isRunning = MutableStateFlow(false)
93	    val isRunning: StateFlow<Boolean> = _isRunning
94	
95	    private val _isPaused = MutableStateFlow(false)
96	    val isPaused: StateFlow<Boolean> = _isPaused
97	
98	    inner class LocalBinder : Binder() {
99	        fun getService(): ExerciseService = this@ExerciseService
100	    }
101	
102	    override fun onBind(intent: Intent?): IBinder = binder
103	
104	    override fun onCreate() {
105	        super.onCreate()
106	        Log.d(TAG, "ExerciseService created")
107	
108	        runningEngine = RunningEngine(this)
109	
110	        // Initialize Room Database
111	        workoutDatabase = WorkoutDatabase.getInstance(this)
112	        workoutDao = workoutDatabase.workoutDao()
113	
114	        exerciseManager = ExerciseManager(this).apply {
115	            onHeartRateUpdate = { hr ->
116	                Log.d(TAG, "HR update: $hr")
117	                runningEngine.updateHeartRate(hr)
118	                // Update metrics immediately for UI
119	                _metrics.value = _metrics.value.copy(heartRate = hr)
120	            }
121	            onLocationUpdate = { lat, lon, timestamp ->
122	                Log.d(TAG, "GPS update: $lat, $lon")
123	                runningEngine.updateGps(lat, lon, timestamp)
124	            }
125	            onStepsUpdate = { steps ->
126	                Log.d(TAG, "Cadence update: $steps")
127	                runningEngine.updateCadence(steps)
128	            }
129	            onDistanceUpdate = { meters ->
130	                Log.d(TAG, "Distance update: $meters m")
131	                runningEngine.updateDistance(meters)
132	            }
133	            onStepsDeltaUpdate = { steps ->
134	                Log.d(TAG, "Step delta: $steps")
135	                runningEngine.updateStepsDelta(steps)
136	            }
137	        }
138	
139	        createNotificationChannel()
140	
141	        // BLE 초기화 - Service context로 생성하여 Activity lifecycle과 분리
142	        initializeBle()
143	
144	        // Start immediate heart rate measurement (before exercise starts)
145	        serviceScope.launch {
146	            exerciseManager.startMeasuringHeartRate()
147	        }
148	    }
149	
150	    /**
151	     * BLE 컴포넌트 초기화
152	     * Service context로 생성하여 화면 꺼져도 BLE 연결 유지
153	     */
154	    @android.annotation.SuppressLint("MissingPermission")
155	    private fun createRLensScanner(targetAddress: String?): RLensScanner {
156	        currentTargetAddress = targetAddress
157	        val prefs = getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, android.content.Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
158	        return RLensScanner(
159	            context = this,
160	            targetAddress = targetAddress,
161	            onDeviceFound = { device ->
162	                Log.d(TAG, "Found rLens device: ${device.name} (${device.address})")
163	                if (targetAddress == null) {
164	                    // First run or new device mode: save the discovered device
165	                    prefs.edit().putString(KEY_RLENS_ADDRESS, device.address).apply()
166	                    Log.d(TAG, "Registered rLens: ${device.address}")
167	                }
168	                scanTimeoutJob?.cancel()
169	                scanAttemptCount = 0
170	                isInNewDeviceMode = false
171	                rLensConnection?.connect(device)
172	            }
173	        )
174	    }
175	
176	    private fun initializeBle() {
177	        Log.d(TAG, "Initializing BLE components with Service context")
178	
179	        val prefs = getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, android.content.Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
180	        val savedAddress = prefs.getString(KEY_RLENS_ADDRESS, null)
181	        Log.d(TAG, "Saved rLens address: ${savedAddress ?: "none (first run)"}")
182	
183	        rLensScanner = createRLensScanner(savedAddress)
184	
185	        rLensConnection = RLensConnection(this) { state ->
186	            Log.d(TAG, "BLE connection state: $state")
187	            _connectionState.value = state
188	
189	            // 연결 완료 시 자동으로 운동 시작
190	            if (state == RLensConnection.ConnectionState.CONNECTED && !_isRunning.value) {
191	                Log.d(TAG, "Auto-starting exercise on BLE connection")
192	                startExercise()
193	            }
194	        }
195	    }
196	
197	    // Scan timeout job
198	    private var scanTimeoutJob: Job? = null
199	    private val SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS = 3000L  // BLE 광고 주기 100~250ms, 3초면 충분
200	
201	    /**
202	     * BLE 스캔 시작
203	     *
204	     * 재시도 전략:
205	     * - 저장된 기기: 3초×2 → 미발견 시 새 기기 등록 모드
206	     * - 새 기기 등록 모드: 3초×2 → 미발견 시 NOT_FOUND
207	     * - 최초 실행(저장 기기 없음): 3초×2 → 미발견 시 NOT_FOUND
208	     */
209	    fun startScanning() {
210	        val attempt = scanAttemptCount + 1
211	        val mode = if (isInNewDeviceMode) "new-device" else "saved(${currentTargetAddress ?: "any"})"
212	        Log.d(TAG, "BLE scan start — attempt $attempt, mode=$mode")
213	        _connectionState.value = RLensConnection.ConnectionState.SCANNING
214	        rLensScanner?.startScan()
215	
216	        scanTimeoutJob?.cancel()
217	        scanTimeoutJob = serviceScope.launch {
218	            delay(SCAN_TIMEOUT_MS)
219	            if (_connectionState.value != RLensConnection.ConnectionState.SCANNING) return@launch
220	
221	            rLensScanner?.stopScan()
222	            scanAttemptCount++
223	            Log.w(TAG, "Scan timeout (attempt $scanAttemptCount)")
224	
225	            val prefs = getSharedPreferences(PREFS_NAME, android.content.Context.MODE_PRIVATE)
226	
227	            when {
228	                // 저장된 기기 2회 실패 → 새 기기 등록 모드 진입
229	                !isInNewDeviceMode && currentTargetAddress != null && scanAttemptCount >= 2 -> {
230	                    Log.w(TAG, "Saved device not found — entering new device registration mode")
231	                    prefs.edit().remove(KEY_RLENS_ADDRESS).apply()
232	                    isInNewDeviceMode = true
233	                    scanAttemptCount = 0
234	                    rLensScanner = createRLensScanner(null)
235	                    startScanning()
236	                }
237	                // 새 기기 등록 모드 2회 실패 → NOT_FOUND
238	                isInNewDeviceMode && scanAttemptCount >= 2 -> {
239	                    Log.w(TAG, "New device not found after 2 attempts")
240	                    scanAttemptCount = 0
241	                    isInNewDeviceMode = false
242	                    _connectionState.value = RLensConnection.ConnectionState.NOT_FOUND
243	                }
244	                // 그 외 (1차 실패, 또는 최초 실행 1차 실패) → 재시도
245	                else -> {
246	                    Log.d(TAG, "Retrying scan...")
247	                    startScanning()
248	                }
249	            }
250	        }
251	    }
252	
253	    /**
254	     * BLE 스캔 중지
255	     */
256	    fun stopScanning() {
257	        Log.d(TAG, "Stopping BLE scan")
258	        scanTimeoutJob?.cancel()
259	        rLensScanner?.stopScan()
260	    }
261	
262	    override fun onStartCommand(intent: Intent?, flags: Int, startId: Int): Int {
263	        Log.d(TAG, "onStartCommand")
264	        // Acquire wake lock immediately when service starts foreground
265	        acquireWakeLock()
266	        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.UPSIDE_DOWN_CAKE) {
267	            startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification(), ServiceInfo.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_HEALTH)
268	        } else {
269	            startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification())
270	        }
271	        return START_STICKY
272	    }
273	
274	    override fun onDestroy() {
275	        super.onDestroy()
276	        Log.d(TAG, "ExerciseService destroyed")
277	        serviceScope.cancel()
278	        timerJob?.cancel()
279	
280	        // BLE 정리
281	        rLensScanner?.stopScan()
282	        rLensScanner = null
283	        rLensConnection?.disconnect()
284	        rLensConnection = null
285	
286	        // Release wake lock
287	        releaseWakeLock()
288	    }
289	
290	    /**
291	     * @deprecated BLE connection is now managed internally by Service
292	     * This method is kept for backwards compatibility but does nothing
293	     */
294	    @Suppress("UNUSED_PARAMETER")
295	    @Deprecated("BLE is now managed by Service. Use startScanning() instead.")
296	    fun setRLensConnection(connection: RLensConnection) {
297	        Log.d(TAG, "setRLensConnection() called but ignored - BLE is managed by Service")
298	        // Do nothing - BLE is now managed internally
299	    }
300	
301	    /**
302	     * Start running exercise
303	     */
304	    fun startExercise() {
305	        Log.d(TAG, "Starting exercise from service")
306	
307	        // Ensure foreground service is started (needed for auto-start from BLE callback)
308	        acquireWakeLock()
309	        if (Build.VERSION.SDK_INT >= Build.VERSION_CODES.UPSIDE_DOWN_CAKE) {
310	            startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification(), ServiceInfo.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_TYPE_HEALTH)
311	        } else {
312	            startForeground(NOTIFICATION_ID, createNotification())
313	        }
314	
315	        runningEngine.reset()
316	        runningEngine.start()
317	        _isRunning.value = true
318	
319	        // Create new workout session in DB
320	        currentSessionId = UUID.randomUUID().toString()
321	        serviceScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
322	            workoutDao.insertSession(
323	                WorkoutSession(
324	                    sessionId = currentSessionId!!,
325	                    startTime = System.currentTimeMillis()
326	                )
327	            )
328	            Log.d(TAG, "Created workout session: $currentSessionId")
329	        }
330	
331	        // Start Health Services
332	        serviceScope.launch {
333	            exerciseManager.startExercise()
334	        }
335	
336	        // Start 1Hz timer
337	        startTimer()
338	    }
339	
340	    /**
341	     * Pause exercise
342	     */
343	    fun pauseExercise() {
344	        serviceScope.launch {
345	            if (runningEngine.isActive()) {
346	                Log.d(TAG, "Pausing exercise")
347	                runningEngine.pause()
348	                exerciseManager.pauseExercise()
349	                _isPaused.value = true
350	            } else {
351	                Log.d(TAG, "Resuming exercise")
352	                runningEngine.resume()
353	                exerciseManager.resumeExercise()
354	                _isPaused.value = false
355	            }
356	        }
357	    }
358	
359	    /**
360	     * Stop exercise
361	     */
362	    fun stopExercise() {
363	        Log.d(TAG, "Stopping exercise from service")
364	        val finalMetrics = runningEngine.getCurrentMetrics()
365	        runningEngine.stop()
366	        _isRunning.value = false
367	        _isPaused.value = false
368	        timerJob?.cancel()
369	
370	        // Update session with summary stats and cleanup
371	        currentSessionId?.let { sessionId ->
372	            serviceScope.launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
373	                try {
374	                    // Calculate averages from samples
375	                    val avgHr = workoutDao.getAvgHeartRate(sessionId)?.toInt() ?: 0
376	                    val avgPace = workoutDao.getAvgPace(sessionId)?.toInt() ?: 0
377	                    val avgCad = workoutDao.getAvgCadence(sessionId)?.toInt() ?: 0
378	
379	                    // Get existing session and update it
380	                    workoutDao.getSession(sessionId)?.let { session ->
381	                        val updatedSession = session.copy(
382	                            endTime = System.currentTimeMillis(),
383	                            totalDistanceMeters = finalMetrics.distanceMeters,
384	                            totalDurationSeconds = finalMetrics.elapsedSeconds,
385	                            avgHeartRate = avgHr,
386	                            avgPaceSecondsPerKm = avgPace,
387	                            avgCadence = avgCad
388	                        )
389	                        workoutDao.updateSession(updatedSession)
390	                        Log.d(TAG, "Updated session: $sessionId, duration=${finalMetrics.elapsedSeconds}s, distance=${finalMetrics.distanceMeters}m")
391	                    }
392	
393	                    // Cleanup: keep only 50 most recent sessions
394	                    workoutDao.keepRecentSessions(50)
395	                    val sessionCount = workoutDao.getSessionCount()
396	                    val sampleCount = workoutDao.getTotalSampleCount()
397	                    Log.d(TAG, "DB stats: $sessionCount sessions, $sampleCount samples")
398	
399	                } catch (e: Exception) {
400	                    Log.e(TAG, "Failed to update session", e)
401	                }
402	            }
403	        }
404	        currentSessionId = null
405	
406	        serviceScope.launch {
407	            exerciseManager.endExercise()
408	        }
409	
410	        // BLE 정리
411	        rLensScanner?.stopScan()
412	        rLensConnection?.disconnect()
413	        _connectionState.value = RLensConnection.ConnectionState.DISCONNECTED
414	
415	        // Release wake lock
416	        releaseWakeLock()
417	
418	        // Stop foreground and stop service
419	        stopForeground(STOP_FOREGROUND_REMOVE)
420	        stopSelf()
421	    }
422	
423	    private fun startTimer() {
424	        timerJob?.cancel()
425	        Log.d(TAG, "Starting timer loop")
426	        timerJob = serviceScope.launch {
427	            var tickCount = 0
428	            while (isActive) {
429	                delay(1000)
430	                tickCount++
431	
432	                // === DIAGNOSTIC LOGGING ===
433	                Log.d(TAG, "=== TICK $tickCount ===")
434	                Log.d(TAG, "WakeLock held: ${wakeLock?.isHeld}")
435	
436	                runningEngine.tick()
437	                val currentMetrics = runningEngine.getCurrentMetrics()
438	                _metrics.value = currentMetrics
439	
440	                Log.d(TAG, "Metrics: HR=${currentMetrics.heartRate}, Pace=${currentMetrics.paceSecondsPerKm}, Time=${currentMetrics.elapsedSeconds}s")
441	
442	                // Send to rLens if connected (5초마다 전송 - 배터리 절감)
443	                if (tickCount % 5 == 0) {
444	                    rLensConnection?.let { conn ->
445	                        val connected = conn.isConnected()
446	                        Log.d(TAG, "rLens connected: $connected")
447	                        if (connected) {
448	                            Log.d(TAG, "Calling sendMetrics...")
449	                            conn.sendMetrics(currentMetrics)
450	                        } else {
451	                            Log.w(TAG, "rLens NOT connected, skipping send")
452	                        }
453	                    } ?: Log.w(TAG, "rLensConnection is NULL")
454	                }
455	
456	                // Save sample to DB (fire-and-forget, IO thread)
457	                currentSessionId?.let { sessionId ->
458	                    launch(Dispatchers.IO) {
459	                        workoutDao.insertSample(
460	                            WorkoutSample(
461	                                sessionId = sessionId,
462	                                timestamp = System.currentTimeMillis(),
463	                                heartRate = currentMetrics.heartRate,
464	                                paceSecondsPerKm = currentMetrics.paceSecondsPerKm,
465	                                cadence = currentMetrics.cadence,
466	                                distanceMeters = currentMetrics.distanceMeters,
467	                                latitude = currentMetrics.latitude,
468	                                longitude = currentMetrics.longitude
469	                            )
470	                        )
471	                    }
472	                }
473	
474	                // Update notification with current metrics
475	                updateNotification(currentMetrics)
476	            }
477	            Log.w(TAG, "Timer loop EXITED! isActive=$isActive")
478	        }
479	    }
480	
481	    private fun createNotificationChannel() {
482	        val channel = NotificationChannel(
483	            CHANNEL_ID,
484	            "Running Exercise",
485	            NotificationManager.IMPORTANCE_HIGH  // Maximum priority to prevent process kill
486	        ).apply {
487	            description = "Active running exercise"
488	            setShowBadge(true)
489	            lockscreenVisibility = Notification.VISIBILITY_PUBLIC
490	        }
491	
492	        val notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
493	        notificationManager.createNotificationChannel(channel)
494	    }
495	
496	    private fun acquireWakeLock() {
497	        if (wakeLock == null) {
498	            val powerManager = getSystemService(PowerManager::class.java)
499	            wakeLock = powerManager.newWakeLock(
500	                PowerManager.PARTIAL_WAKE_LOCK,
501	                "RunVision::ExerciseWakeLock"
502	            ).apply {
503	                acquire()
504	            }
505	            Log.d(TAG, "WakeLock acquired")
506	        }
507	    }
508	
509	    private fun releaseWakeLock() {
510	        wakeLock?.let {
511	            if (it.isHeld) {
512	                it.release()
513	                Log.d(TAG, "WakeLock released")
514	            }
515	        }
516	        wakeLock = null
517	    }
518	
519	    /**
520	     * Get or create the PendingIntent (reused for consistency)
521	     */
522	    private fun getNotificationPendingIntent(): PendingIntent {
523	        return notificationPendingIntent ?: PendingIntent.getActivity(
524	            this,
525	            0,
526	            Intent(this, MainActivity::class.java).apply {
527	                flags = Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_SINGLE_TOP or Intent.FLAG_ACTIVITY_CLEAR_TOP
528	            },
529	            PendingIntent.FLAG_IMMUTABLE or PendingIntent.FLAG_UPDATE_CURRENT
530	        ).also { notificationPendingIntent = it }
531	    }
532	
533	    /**
534	     * Get or create the NotificationBuilder (reused for consistent Ongoing Activity)
535	     */
536	    private fun getNotificationBuilder(): NotificationCompat.Builder {
537	        return notificationBuilder ?: NotificationCompat.Builder(this, CHANNEL_ID)
538	            .setSmallIcon(R.drawable.ic_runner)
539	            .setOngoing(true)
540	            .setCategory(NotificationCompat.CATEGORY_WORKOUT)
541	            .setVisibility(NotificationCompat.VISIBILITY_PUBLIC)
542	            .setPriority(NotificationCompat.PRIORITY_HIGH)
543	            .setForegroundServiceBehavior(NotificationCompat.FOREGROUND_SERVICE_IMMEDIATE)
544	            .setLocusId(LocusIdCompat("runvision_exercise"))  // Helps system recognize this as exercise
545	            .setContentIntent(getNotificationPendingIntent())
546	            .also { notificationBuilder = it }
547	    }
548	
549	    private fun createNotification(): Notification {
550	        val builder = getNotificationBuilder()
551	            .setContentTitle("RunVision")
552	            .setContentText("Running...")
553	
554	        val pendingIntent = getNotificationPendingIntent()
555	
556	        // Create Ongoing Activity - shows on watch face for quick return
557	        val ongoingActivity = OngoingActivity.Builder(this, NOTIFICATION_ID, builder)
558	            .setStaticIcon(R.drawable.ic_runner)
559	            .setTouchIntent(pendingIntent)
560	            .setLocusId(LocusIdCompat("runvision_exercise"))
561	            .setStatus(
562	                Status.Builder()
563	                    .addTemplate("Running #time#")
564	                    .addPart("time", Status.StopwatchPart(System.currentTimeMillis()))
565	                    .build()
566	            )
567	            .build()
568	
569	        ongoingActivity.apply(this)
570	
571	        return builder.build()
572	    }
573	
574	    private fun updateNotification(metrics: RunningMetrics) {
575	        val builder = getNotificationBuilder()
576	            .setContentTitle("RunVision")
577	            .setContentText("${formatTime(metrics.elapsedSeconds)} | ♥${metrics.heartRate}")
578	
579	        val pendingIntent = getNotificationPendingIntent()
580	
581	        // Update Ongoing Activity status (reuse same builder)
582	        val ongoingActivity = OngoingActivity.Builder(this, NOTIFICATION_ID, builder)
583	            .setStaticIcon(R.drawable.ic_runner)
584	            .setTouchIntent(pendingIntent)
585	            .setLocusId(LocusIdCompat("runvision_exercise"))
586	            .setStatus(
587	                Status.Builder()
588	                    .addTemplate("#time# ♥#hr#")
589	                    .addPart("time", Status.TextPart(formatTime(metrics.elapsedSeconds)))
590	                    .addPart("hr", Status.TextPart("${metrics.heartRate}"))
591	                    .build()
592	            )
593	            .build()
594	
595	        ongoingActivity.apply(this)
596	
597	        val notificationManager = getSystemService(NotificationManager::class.java)
598	        notificationManager.notify(NOTIFICATION_ID, builder.build())
599	    }
600	
601	    private fun formatTime(seconds: Int): String {
602	        val h = seconds / 3600
603	        val m = (seconds % 3600) / 60
604	        val s = seconds % 60
605	        return if (h > 0) {
606	            String.format("%d:%02d:%02d", h, m, s)
607	        } else {
608	            String.format("%02d:%02d", m, s)
609	        }
610	    }
611	}

1	package com.runvision.wear
2	
3	import android.Manifest
4	import android.content.ComponentName
5	import android.content.Context
6	import android.content.Intent
7	import android.content.ServiceConnection
8	import android.content.pm.PackageManager
9	import android.os.Bundle
10	import android.os.IBinder
11	import android.util.Log
12	import android.view.WindowManager
13	import androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
14	import androidx.activity.compose.setContent
15	import androidx.activity.result.contract.ActivityResultContracts
16	import androidx.activity.compose.BackHandler
17	import androidx.compose.runtime.*
18	import androidx.compose.ui.platform.LocalLifecycleOwner
19	import androidx.core.content.ContextCompat
20	import androidx.lifecycle.Lifecycle
21	import androidx.lifecycle.lifecycleScope
22	import androidx.lifecycle.repeatOnLifecycle
23	import androidx.navigation.NavHostController
24	import androidx.wear.compose.navigation.SwipeDismissableNavHost
25	import androidx.wear.compose.navigation.composable
26	import androidx.wear.compose.navigation.rememberSwipeDismissableNavController
27	import com.runvision.wear.ble.RLensConnection
28	import com.runvision.wear.data.RunningMetrics
29	import com.runvision.wear.service.ExerciseService
30	import com.runvision.wear.ui.screens.HomeScreen
31	import com.runvision.wear.ui.screens.RunningScreen
32	import com.runvision.wear.ui.theme.RunVisionWearTheme
33	import androidx.wear.ambient.AmbientLifecycleObserver
34	import kotlinx.coroutines.launch
35	
36	/**
37	 * Main entry point for RunVision Wear OS app
38	 *
39	 * Responsibilities:
40	 * - Permission handling (sensors, location, BLE)
41	 * - BLE scanning and connection to rLens
42	 * - Navigation between Home and Running screens
43	 * - Binds to ExerciseService for background running
44	 */
45	class MainActivity : ComponentActivity() {
46	
47	    companion object {
48	        private const val TAG = "MainActivity"
49	        private const val BRIGHT_BRIGHTNESS = 0.9f   // 90% brightness for first 5 seconds
50	        private const val DIM_BRIGHTNESS = 0.05f   // 5% brightness after delay (very dim)
51	        private const val BRIGHTNESS_DIM_DELAY_MS = 5_000L   // 5 seconds
52	    }
53	
54	    // State for Compose UI (observed from Service)
55	    private val connectionState = mutableStateOf(RLensConnection.ConnectionState.DISCONNECTED)
56	    private val metrics = mutableStateOf(RunningMetrics())
57	    private val isRunning = mutableStateOf(false)
58	    private val isPaused = mutableStateOf(false)
59	    private val isAmbient = mutableStateOf(false)
60	
61	    // Service binding (BLE auto-start logic moved to ExerciseService)
62	    private var exerciseService: ExerciseService? = null
63	    private var serviceBound = false
64	    private var navController: NavHostController? = null
65	
66	    // Brightness dimming handler
67	    private val brightnessHandler = android.os.Handler(android.os.Looper.getMainLooper())
68	    private val dimRunnable = Runnable {
69	        Log.d(TAG, "Dimming screen to $DIM_BRIGHTNESS after ${BRIGHTNESS_DIM_DELAY_MS}ms")
70	        setBrightness(DIM_BRIGHTNESS)
71	    }
72	
73	    // Ambient Mode support
74	    private val ambientCallback = object : AmbientLifecycleObserver.AmbientLifecycleCallback {
75	        override fun onEnterAmbient(ambientDetails: AmbientLifecycleObserver.AmbientDetails) {
76	            Log.d(TAG, "Entering ambient mode")
77	            isAmbient.value = true
78	        }
79	
80	        override fun onExitAmbient() {
81	            Log.d(TAG, "Exiting ambient mode")
82	            isAmbient.value = false
83	        }
84	
85	        override fun onUpdateAmbient() {
86	            Log.d(TAG, "Ambient update")
87	            // Force recomposition by toggling state
88	        }
89	    }
90	    private lateinit var ambientObserver: AmbientLifecycleObserver
91	
92	    private val serviceConnection = object : ServiceConnection {
93	        override fun onServiceConnected(name: ComponentName?, service: IBinder?) {
94	            Log.d(TAG, "Service connected")
95	            val binder = service as ExerciseService.LocalBinder
96	            exerciseService = binder.getService()
97	            serviceBound = true
98	
99	            // Check if already running - navigation will happen in Compose via LaunchedEffect
100	            if (exerciseService?.isRunning?.value == true) {
101	                Log.d(TAG, "Service already running, will navigate when navController ready")
102	                isRunning.value = true  // This triggers navigation in Compose
103	            }
104	
105	            // Observe Service's BLE connectionState (Service manages BLE lifecycle)
106	            lifecycleScope.launch {
107	                lifecycle.repeatOnLifecycle(Lifecycle.State.STARTED) {
108	                    exerciseService?.connectionState?.collect { state ->
109	                        Log.d(TAG, "Service connectionState: $state")
110	                        connectionState.value = state
111	                    }
112	                }
113	            }
114	
115	            // Collect metrics from service
116	            lifecycleScope.launch {
117	                lifecycle.repeatOnLifecycle(Lifecycle.State.STARTED) {
118	                    exerciseService?.metrics?.collect { m ->
119	                        metrics.value = m
120	                    }
121	                }
122	            }
123	
124	            lifecycleScope.launch {
125	                lifecycle.repeatOnLifecycle(Lifecycle.State.STARTED) {
126	                    exerciseService?.isRunning?.collect { running ->
127	                        isRunning.value = running
128	                        // Keep screen on with dimmed brightness during exercise
129	                        setScreenMode(running)
130	                    }
131	                }
132	            }
133	
134	            lifecycleScope.launch {
135	                lifecycle.repeatOnLifecycle(Lifecycle.State.STARTED) {
136	                    exerciseService?.isPaused?.collect { paused ->
137	                        isPaused.value = paused
138	                    }
139	                }
140	            }
141	        }
142	
143	        override fun onServiceDisconnected(name: ComponentName?) {
144	            Log.d(TAG, "Service disconnected")
145	            exerciseService = null
146	            serviceBound = false
147	        }
148	    }
149	
150	    private val requiredPermissions = arrayOf(
151	        Manifest.permission.BODY_SENSORS,
152	        Manifest.permission.ACTIVITY_RECOGNITION,
153	        Manifest.permission.ACCESS_FINE_LOCATION,
154	        Manifest.permission.BLUETOOTH_SCAN,
155	        Manifest.permission.BLUETOOTH_CONNECT,
156	        Manifest.permission.POST_NOTIFICATIONS
157	    )
158	
159	    private val permissionLauncher = registerForActivityResult(
160	        ActivityResultContracts.RequestMultiplePermissions()
161	    ) { permissions ->
162	        // Log permission results (BLE scanning handled by Service on START click)
163	        if (!permissions.all { it.value }) {
164	            Log.w(TAG, "Some permissions denied: ${permissions.filter { !it.value }.keys}")
165	        } else {
166	            Log.d(TAG, "All permissions granted")
167	        }
168	    }
169	
170	    override fun onCreate(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
171	        super.onCreate(savedInstanceState)
172	        Log.d(TAG, "onCreate")
173	
174	        // Initialize Ambient Mode observer
175	        ambientObserver = AmbientLifecycleObserver(this, ambientCallback)
176	        lifecycle.addObserver(ambientObserver)
177	
178	        // BLE is now managed by ExerciseService (see initializeBle())
179	        // Service context keeps BLE alive even when screen is off
180	
181	        setContent {
182	            RunVisionWearTheme {
183	                val nav = rememberSwipeDismissableNavController()
184	                navController = nav
185	
186	                // Navigate to running screen if service is already running
187	                // This handles activity recreation (screen on/off)
188	                val currentIsRunning = isRunning.value
189	                Log.d(TAG, "Compose: currentIsRunning=$currentIsRunning")
190	
191	                LaunchedEffect(currentIsRunning) {
192	                    Log.d(TAG, "LaunchedEffect triggered: isRunning=$currentIsRunning")
193	                    if (currentIsRunning) {
194	                        // Small delay to ensure navigation is fully initialized
195	                        kotlinx.coroutines.delay(100)
196	                        val currentRoute = nav.currentBackStackEntry?.destination?.route
197	                        Log.d(TAG, "LaunchedEffect: currentRoute=$currentRoute")
198	                        if (currentRoute == "home" || currentRoute == null) {
199	                            Log.d(TAG, "Navigating to running screen (service already running)")
200	                            nav.navigate("running") {
201	                                popUpTo("home") { inclusive = false }
202	                            }
203	                        }
204	                    }
205	                }
206	
207	                SwipeDismissableNavHost(
208	                    navController = nav,
209	                    startDestination = "home"
210	                ) {
211	                    composable("home") {
212	                        HomeScreen(
213	                            connectionState = connectionState.value,
214	                            onStartClick = {
215	                                // START button: Service handles scanning and auto-start
216	                                Log.d(TAG, "START button pressed, starting scan via Service")
217	
218	                                // If already connected, start immediately
219	                                if (connectionState.value == RLensConnection.ConnectionState.CONNECTED) {
220	                                    startRunning()
221	                                    nav.navigate("running")
222	                                } else {
223	                                    // Start foreground service first, then start scanning
224	                                    // Auto-start will trigger on BLE connection
225	                                    val intent = Intent(this@MainActivity, ExerciseService::class.java)
226	                                    startForegroundService(intent)
227	                                    exerciseService?.startScanning()
228	                                }
229	                            }
230	                        )
231	                    }
232	                    composable("running") {
233	                        // Handle back button/swipe to stop exercise
234	                        BackHandler {
235	                            Log.d(TAG, "Back pressed in running screen, stopping exercise")
236	                            stopRunning()
237	                            nav.popBackStack()
238	                        }
239	
240	                        RunningScreen(
241	                            metrics = metrics.value,
242	                            isAmbient = isAmbient.value,
243	                            isPaused = isPaused.value,
244	                            onPauseClick = { togglePause() },
245	                            onStopClick = {
246	                                stopRunning()
247	                                nav.popBackStack()
248	                            },
249	                            onScreenTouch = { wakeUpScreen() }
250	                        )
251	                    }
252	                }
253	            }
254	        }
255	
256	        checkPermissions()
257	    }
258	
259	    override fun onStart() {
260	        super.onStart()
261	        Log.d(TAG, "onStart, serviceBound=$serviceBound")
262	
263	        // Bind to ExerciseService
264	        Intent(this, ExerciseService::class.java).also { intent ->
265	            bindService(intent, serviceConnection, Context.BIND_AUTO_CREATE)
266	        }
267	
268	        // If already bound (screen wake), sync state immediately
269	        exerciseService?.let { service ->
270	            val running = service.isRunning.value
271	            Log.d(TAG, "onStart: service already bound, isRunning=$running")
272	            if (running) {
273	                isRunning.value = true
274	            }
275	            // Immediately sync metrics to avoid showing stale data
276	            metrics.value = service.metrics.value
277	            Log.d(TAG, "onStart: synced metrics, time=${metrics.value.elapsedSeconds}s")
278	        }
279	    }
280	
281	    override fun onStop() {
282	        super.onStop()
283	        Log.d(TAG, "onStop")
284	        // Never unbind - let service continue in background
285	        // Service will be unbound when Activity is destroyed
286	    }
287	
288	    /**
289	     * Check and request required permissions
290	     */
291	    private fun checkPermissions() {
292	        val missingPermissions = requiredPermissions.filter {
293	            ContextCompat.checkSelfPermission(this, it) != PackageManager.PERMISSION_GRANTED
294	        }
295	
296	        if (missingPermissions.isEmpty()) {
297	            Log.d(TAG, "All permissions already granted")
298	            // BLE scanning now handled by Service on START button click
299	        } else {
300	            Log.d(TAG, "Requesting permissions: $missingPermissions")
301	            permissionLauncher.launch(missingPermissions.toTypedArray())
302	        }
303	    }
304	
305	    /**
306	     * Start a new running session
307	     */
308	    private fun startRunning() {
309	        Log.d(TAG, "Starting running session")
310	
311	        // Start and bind to service (Service manages BLE internally)
312	        val intent = Intent(this, ExerciseService::class.java)
313	        startForegroundService(intent)
314	
315	        // If already bound, start exercise
316	        exerciseService?.startExercise()
317	    }
318	
319	    /**
320	     * Toggle pause/resume state
321	     */
322	    private fun togglePause() {
323	        exerciseService?.pauseExercise()
324	    }
325	
326	    /**
327	     * Stop the running session
328	     */
329	    private fun stopRunning() {
330	        Log.d(TAG, "Stopping running session")
331	        // Service manages BLE - stopExercise() will disconnect and stop scanning
332	        exerciseService?.stopExercise()
333	    }
334	
335	    /**
336	     * Set screen mode for running/idle state
337	     * - Running: Bright for 10 seconds, then dim (power saving)
338	     * - Idle: Normal brightness, allow screen to turn off
339	     */
340	    private fun setScreenMode(running: Boolean) {
341	        if (running) {
342	            Log.d(TAG, "Setting screen mode: ON + BRIGHT (will dim after ${BRIGHTNESS_DIM_DELAY_MS}ms)")
343	            window.addFlags(WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON)
344	            setBrightness(BRIGHT_BRIGHTNESS)
345	            // Schedule dimming after delay
346	            brightnessHandler.removeCallbacks(dimRunnable)
347	            brightnessHandler.postDelayed(dimRunnable, BRIGHTNESS_DIM_DELAY_MS)
348	        } else {
349	            Log.d(TAG, "Setting screen mode: NORMAL")
350	            // Cancel scheduled dimming
351	            brightnessHandler.removeCallbacks(dimRunnable)
352	            window.clearFlags(WindowManager.LayoutParams.FLAG_KEEP_SCREEN_ON)
353	            setBrightness(WindowManager.LayoutParams.BRIGHTNESS_OVERRIDE_NONE)
354	        }
355	    }
356	
357	    /**
358	     * Set screen brightness
359	     */
360	    private fun setBrightness(brightness: Float) {
361	        val layoutParams = window.attributes
362	        layoutParams.screenBrightness = brightness
363	        window.attributes = layoutParams
364	    }
365	
366	    /**
367	     * Wake up screen on touch - brighten and restart dim timer
368	     */
369	    private fun wakeUpScreen() {
370	        if (isRunning.value) {
371	            Log.d(TAG, "Screen touched - waking up brightness")
372	            setBrightness(BRIGHT_BRIGHTNESS)
373	            brightnessHandler.removeCallbacks(dimRunnable)
374	            brightnessHandler.postDelayed(dimRunnable, BRIGHTNESS_DIM_DELAY_MS)
375	        }
376	    }
377	
378	    override fun onDestroy() {
379	        super.onDestroy()
380	        Log.d(TAG, "onDestroy, isRunning=${isRunning.value}")
381	
382	        // Unbind service (Service continues to manage BLE independently)
383	        if (serviceBound) {
384	            unbindService(serviceConnection)
385	            serviceBound = false
386	        }
387	        // BLE is managed by Service - no cleanup needed here
388	    }
389	}

1	package com.runvision.wear.ui.screens
2	
3	import androidx.compose.foundation.background
4	import androidx.compose.foundation.layout.*
5	import androidx.compose.runtime.Composable
6	import androidx.compose.ui.Alignment
7	import androidx.compose.ui.Modifier
8	import androidx.compose.ui.graphics.Color
9	import androidx.compose.ui.text.font.FontWeight
10	import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextAlign
11	import androidx.compose.ui.text.style.TextOverflow
12	import androidx.compose.ui.unit.dp
13	import androidx.compose.ui.unit.sp
14	import androidx.wear.compose.material.*
15	import com.runvision.wear.ble.RLensConnection
16	
17	@Composable
18	fun HomeScreen(
19	    connectionState: RLensConnection.ConnectionState,
20	    onStartClick: () -> Unit
21	) {
22	    val listState = rememberScalingLazyListState()
23	
24	    Scaffold(
25	        positionIndicator = {
26	            PositionIndicator(scalingLazyListState = listState)
27	        }
28	    ) {
29	        ScalingLazyColumn(
30	            state = listState,
31	            horizontalAlignment = Alignment.CenterHorizontally,
32	            modifier = Modifier
33	                .fillMaxSize()
34	                .background(Color.Black)
35	        ) {
36	            item {
37	                Text(
38	                    text = "RunVision",
39	                    fontSize = 28.sp,
40	                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
41	                    color = Color.White,
42	                    textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
43	                    maxLines = 1,
44	                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
45	                    modifier = Modifier
46	                        .fillMaxWidth()
47	                        .padding(horizontal = 16.dp)
48	                )
49	            }
50	
51	            item {
52	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
53	            }
54	
55	            item {
56	                Button(
57	                    onClick = onStartClick,
58	                    modifier = Modifier
59	                        .fillMaxWidth(0.6f)
60	                        .padding(horizontal = 8.dp),
61	                    colors = ButtonDefaults.primaryButtonColors()
62	                ) {
63	                    Text(
64	                        text = "START",
65	                        fontSize = 18.sp,
66	                        fontWeight = FontWeight.Bold,
67	                        maxLines = 1,
68	                        overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis
69	                    )
70	                }
71	            }
72	
73	            item {
74	                Spacer(modifier = Modifier.height(12.dp))
75	            }
76	
77	            item {
78	                val (statusText, statusColor) = when (connectionState) {
79	                    RLensConnection.ConnectionState.CONNECTED -> "Connected" to Color(0xFF4CAF50)
80	                    RLensConnection.ConnectionState.CONNECTING -> "Connecting.." to Color(0xFFFF9800)
81	                    RLensConnection.ConnectionState.RECONNECTING -> "Reconnecting.." to Color(0xFFFF9800)
82	                    RLensConnection.ConnectionState.SCANNING -> "Scanning.." to Color(0xFF2196F3)
83	                    RLensConnection.ConnectionState.NOT_FOUND -> "Not Found" to Color(0xFFF44336)
84	                    RLensConnection.ConnectionState.DISCONNECTED -> "READY" to Color.Gray
85	                }
86	                Text(
87	                    text = statusText,
88	                    fontSize = 16.sp,
89	                    fontWeight = FontWeight.Medium,
90	                    color = statusColor,
91	                    textAlign = TextAlign.Center,
92	                    maxLines = 1,
93	                    overflow = TextOverflow.Ellipsis,
94	                    modifier = Modifier
95	                        .fillMaxWidth()
96	                        .padding(horizontal = 16.dp)
97	                )
98	            }
99	        }
100	    }
101	}

content.text:
The actual code reveals a **spec inconsistency I must resolve before writing the plan** (Rule 0 — stop and think, don't paper over):

`★ Insight ─────────────────────────────────────`
**문제 발견:** 스펙 §3.4는 `RLensConnection.kt`를 **diff 0**(미변경)으로 명시했습니다. 그러나 `ExerciseService.startTimer()`는 BLE 전송을 `rLensConnection.sendMetrics(currentMetrics: RunningMetrics)` 단일 메서드로만 합니다 (`ExerciseService.kt:449`). 자전거 패킷(속도 ×60·고도)을 보내려면 `RLensConnection`에 전송 경로가 **필요**한데, 그 클래스가 `RunningMetrics`만 받는 `sendMetrics`만 노출한다면 스펙의 "RLensConnection 무수정" 주장과 충돌합니다. 이건 plan을 쓰기 전에 실제 API를 확인하고 스펙을 정합화해야 할 사항입니다 — 추측으로 덮으면 안 됩니다.
`─────────────────────────────────────────────────`

Reading the remaining ground-truth files (BLE connection API, engine interface, metrics shape, screen pattern, test style) to resolve this and write real code.
